test.name: TC-01-01: Successful Registration With Valid Data

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Starting Browser process /opt/homebrew/lib/python3.11/site-packages/Browser/wrapper/index.js using at 127.0.0.1:51509

No browser and context was open. New browser and context was automatically opened when page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'text=Register'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector input[placeholder="johndoe"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.msg: Fills the text 'testuser' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Fills the text 'test@email.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Fills the text '123456' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) instructor by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select.
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'button.btn[type="submit"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

test.name: TC-05-01: Create A Note On The Board

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL http://localhost:5173/classroom/08T1DL
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=textarea[placeholder="Write a note..."] at state attached
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.arg: (elem, arg) => { let proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(elem); let setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto, "value").set; setter.call(elem, arg); elem.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); }
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.
